title: UK Bans Al Quds Protest March That Critics Say Supports Iranian Regime
summary_full: Britain’s government invoked rarely-used powers to ban a pro-Palestinian protest march scheduled for Sunday.
summary_public: Britain’s government invoked rarely-used powers to ban a pro-Palestinian protest march scheduled for Sunday.
